creator: alt2600@icloud.com
text:
another nothing can be done I guess. breaks live building of blender so its basically lost all my cad to cython, now its chose audio lv2 or video with blender via cannot use both lv2 and opencolorio libraries anymore as runtime conflicts make it impossible between py-rdflib going to py-html5lib-modern and opencolorio using furo which requires py-html5lib, poudriere isn't going to fix this one. 

Is modern necessary, or can the old one just get updated to 1.2? sounds trivial, but I'm well aware python tends to not like to be compatible with python, so probably not.
